header.setupNoneRed: No vehicle or setup saved yet — click to add one
header.setupNoneOrange: No setup saved for this session — click to configure

lapTable.noLapsHint: Select a track with a start/finish line
lapTable.sectorSumsTitle: Show a running S1/S2/S3 total before each major sector

snapshots.title: Lap Snapshots
snapshots.info: You can only save one snapshot per engine per course. It records the full lap data, along with the setup information from the recorded session.
snapshots.saveHint: Assign an engine to this session to capture its fastest lap.
snapshots.empty: No snapshots saved for this course yet.
snapshots.confirmOverwrite: Your saved snapshot ({{time}}) is faster than this lap. Overwrite it anyway?
snapshots.errNoEngine: Assign an engine (vehicle) to this session first.

overlays.title: Overlays
overlays.info: Overlays are technically separate from the main reference lap — the reference lap is where deltas are calculated from.
overlays.currentEmpty: No overlays yet. Add laps from this session, the Snapshots menu, or another log below.
overlays.noTaggedLogs: No other saved logs are tagged with this course.
overlays.errNoLaps: No laps detected for the current course.
overlays.errLoad: Failed to load or parse the file.

crop.title: Crop to a sector
crop.disabledTitle: Select a lap with sectors to crop
crop.enabledTitle: Crop the view to a sector
